name: What should be included in an AI visibility audit?

mainEntity.name: What should be included in an AI visibility audit?

acceptedAnswer.text: A strong audit should show current AI mentions, competitor visibility, technical issues, content gaps, and schema opportunities. You should also review whether your content answers real user questions in a format AI systems can easily reuse.
acceptedAnswer.description: Look for AI mentions, competitor gaps, technical blockers, schema issues, and content opportunities.

description: Look for AI mentions, competitor gaps, technical blockers, schema issues, and content opportunities.
